title: Terms and Conditions
description: Wedding-planner Frankie despises Julian Marsh, the litigation lawyer who got her favourite venue shut down on a technicality. So when both of them need a fake partner for the same three-week stretch of family obligations, the contract they draft has nineteen clauses, two signatures, and absolutely no provision for what happens when they stop pretending.

chapters.title: The Man Who Closed The Orangery
